findings.title: GraphModal has no focus trap
findings.current: No focus management — Tab escapes modal
findings.expected: Focus trap on open, return focus on close

findings.title: GraphModal lacks role=dialog, aria-modal, aria-labelledby
findings.current: Plain <div> with no ARIA role

findings.title: GraphSearch overlay missing dialog semantics and focus trap
findings.current: No role=dialog, no focus containment
findings.expected: Add role=dialog, trap Tab within input+results

findings.title: Graph canvas not keyboard navigable — no accessible alternative
findings.current: WebGL canvas, mouse-only navigation
findings.expected: At minimum aria-label on container directing users to Ctrl+K search

findings.title: LocalGraphWidget collapse toggle missing aria-expanded
findings.current: No aria-expanded, no aria-controls

findings.title: LocalGraphWidget icon buttons missing aria-label (title only)
findings.current: title= only — not announced by screen readers

findings.title: GraphModal close button missing aria-label
findings.current: title='Close (Esc)' with X character — title not announced

findings.title: GraphToolbar search button and legend toggle missing ARIA
findings.current: Search button uses Unicode char, no aria-label. Legend toggle no aria-expanded

findings.title: theme-btn aria-label is static 'auto' — never reflects actual state
findings.current: aria-label='auto' never changes

findings.title: GraphFilters Blog Posts/Projects checkboxes missing labels
findings.current: Bare <input type=checkbox> not connected to label

findings.title: GraphFilters topic-group checkboxes missing accessible labels
findings.current: Indeterminate checkboxes with no accessible name
findings.expected: Use aria-labelledby pointing to group name

findings.title: Depth slider in LocalGraphWidget has no accessible label
findings.current: <input type=range> adjacent to text 'Depth' but not connected

findings.title: GraphSearch results not announced as listbox/live region
findings.current: No role=listbox, no aria-live, input not connected to results
findings.expected: Add role=listbox, aria-haspopup, aria-selected, live region

findings.title: No prefers-reduced-motion guard for graph animations
findings.current: ForceAtlas2 and camera.animate run regardless of motion preference

findings.title: BackToTopButton has no aria-label on mobile
findings.current: Icon-only button below md breakpoint, sr-only text exists but icon not hidden
findings.expected: Add aria-label='Back to top', aria-hidden on icons

findings.title: GraphFilters section toggles missing aria-expanded
findings.current: Arrow characters only, no aria-expanded

findings.title: GlobalGraphPage <aside> has no aria-label
findings.current: <aside> with no label — 'complementary' landmark is anonymous

findings.title: graph.astro has no h1 heading and no Footer
findings.current: No h1, first heading is h2 'Filters' inside React component. No Footer.
findings.expected: Add sr-only h1 'Knowledge Graph'. Add Footer.

findings.title: Language and tag toggle buttons missing aria-pressed
findings.current: Visual state only — no aria-pressed

findings.title: Tooltip info mouse-only — no screen reader equivalent
findings.current: Hover-only tooltip, never surfaced to screen readers
findings.expected: aria-live region or alternative accessible channel

findings.title: GraphSearch input has no accessible label
findings.current: placeholder only — no <label> or aria-label
